holdings.infoBox: FDN is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 10.46%, Cisco Systems at 9.03%, Meta Platforms at 8.29%, Netflix at 6.35%, and Alphabet at 6.11%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dow Jones Internet Index Fund (FDN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ Internet Composite index, a market-cap-weighted index of the largest and most liquid US Internet companies. FDN was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Europe unveils tech sovereignty package amid growing concerns over reliance on U.S. tech
data.text: The proposals include a new act to bolster advanced chip manufacturing and homegrown cloud computing.
